datasets.title: 2020 PRDM9/H3K4me3 mouse spermatogenic-cell epigenome atlas

sourceRefs.summary: The paper states raw and processed data are deposited in GEO under GSE132446.
Official GEO record verified; public, 186 samples, SRA SRP214004, processed data tar listed.

samples.label: Mouse spermatogenic stages from undifferentiated spermatogonia through diplotene, plus WT and mutant meiotic samples

attributes.paperReplicates: Two biological replicates for ChIP-seq and NOMe-seq where applicable
attributes.paperStages: Undiff, A1, B, preleptotene, leptotene, early/mid/late zygotene, early/mid pachytene, diplotene

refs.summary: Downloaded Supplementary Table S1; workbook sheets ChIP-seq and NOMe-seq.

datasets.license: GEO public record; article is CC BY 4.0. Reuse terms for deposited sequencing files should be checked before redistribution.
datasets.sizeEstimate: GEO page lists processed data tar about 62.5 GB; raw sequencing access through SRA SRP214004.
datasets.accessInstructions: Use GEO GSE132446 and SRA SRP214004. Start with processed BED/bigWig artifacts for first-pass figure reproduction; download raw FASTQ only if peak-calling reproducibility is required.

missingDatasets.title: 2020 analysis source code

possibleAlternatives.summary: Methods specify trim_galore, Bowtie2, SAMtools, MACS14/MACS2, bedtools, deepTools, Bismark, and R statistics sufficiently for partial reimplementation.

missingDatasets.title: 2025 NOMe-seq and RNA-seq processing source code
missingDatasets.reason: The 2025 paper states that other source codes for NOMe-seq and RNA-seq are available upon request; only the histone-mark ChIP-seq pipeline URL is public in the paper.

possibleAlternatives.summary: Methods specify RNA-seq, NOMe-seq, PCA, ChromHMM, broad-domain calling, enhancer assignment, GO/GREAT, and statistical tests for partial reimplementation.
